summary: Iteration 15: Comprehensive testing of new event detail page features - Parcours OpenRunner, Adresse exacte, Règlement, Nom organisateur, Compteurs épreuves. All 14 features verified successfully across frontend and backend.
passed_tests: EVENT DETAIL PAGE - races-section with 3 race cards (Trail 42km, Ultra 80km, UTMB 170km)
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - Race cards display counters (0/200, 0/150, 0/150 format)
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - route-section 'Parcours & Altimétrie' visible
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - openrunner-embed iframe with correct src (embed/16658009)
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - openrunner-link 'Voir sur OpenRunner' with external link
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - map-section 'Lieu de départ' visible
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - exact-address displays: Place du Triangle de l Amitié, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - directions-btn 'Comment s'y rendre' with Google Maps link
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - map-embed Google Maps iframe visible
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - regulations-section 'Règlement de la course' visible
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - regulations-toggle collapses/expands correctly
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - regulations-content shows 656 chars when expanded
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - organizer-section 'Organisé par' visible
EVENT DETAIL PAGE - organizer-name displays: Club Sportif Paris
ORGANIZER DASHBOARD - Login as organizer (club@paris-sport.fr) successful
ORGANIZER DASHBOARD - Create event dialog opens
ORGANIZER DASHBOARD - Step 1 has event-exact-address-input field
ORGANIZER DASHBOARD - Step 3 has event-route-url-input field (Parcours OpenRunner)
ORGANIZER DASHBOARD - Step 3 has event-regulations-input field
BACKEND API - GET /api/events/evt_db0c7b851cb9 returns route_url
BACKEND API - GET returns exact_address: Place du Triangle de l Amitié, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc
BACKEND API - GET returns regulations (656 chars)
BACKEND API - GET returns organizer_name: Club Sportif Paris
BACKEND API - GET returns 3 races with participant counters
BACKEND API - POST /api/events accepts and saves route_url, exact_address, regulations
BACKEND API - PUT /api/events/{id} updates route_url, exact_address, regulations correctly
seed_data_creation: Test event evt_db0c7b851cb9 (Trail du Mont Blanc 2026) has all new fields populated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15: Verified all new event detail page features. Test event evt_db0c7b851cb9 contains: route_url='https://www.openrunner.com/route/16658009', exact_address='Place du Triangle de l Amitié, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc', regulations (656 chars), organizer_name='Club Sportif Paris', 3 races (Trail 42km 0/200 95€, Ultra 80km 0/150 145€, UTMB 170km 0/150 250€). Key data-testids: races-section, race-card-{name}, route-section, openrunner-embed, openrunner-link, map-section, exact-address, directions-btn, map-embed, regulations-section, regulations-toggle, regulations-content, organizer-section, organizer-name. Creation form: Step 1 has event-exact-address-input, Step 3 has event-route-url-input and event-regulations-input. Backend EventCreate model accepts Optional[str] for route_url, exact_address, regulations.
features_verified: Section 'Parcours & Altimétrie' with OpenRunner iframe embed
Link 'Voir sur OpenRunner' opens route in new tab
Section 'Lieu de départ' displays exact address
Button 'Comment s'y rendre' opens Google Maps directions
Section 'Règlement de la course' with collapsible toggle
3 races with real-time counters (Trail 42km 0/200, Ultra 80km 0/150, UTMB 170km 0/150)
Animated progress bars on race cards
Creation wizard Step 1: 'Adresse exacte du départ' field
Creation wizard Step 3: 'Parcours OpenRunner' URL field
Creation wizard Step 3: 'Règlement de la course' textarea
Backend accepts and stores route_url, exact_address, regulations fields
